overview.description: Czech digital consulting company specializing in customer experience, Data & AI, brand experience, and digital transformation
overview.description_long: FLO is a Czech digital consulting company operating across Europe and Australia. They blend leading technology, human ingenuity, and bold creativity to deliver digital experience solutions. Services span Consulting & Advisory, Brand Experience, Customer Experience, and Data & AI. Certified Databricks and Salesforce partner (Data Cloud, Agentforce). Growth and expansion backed by Rockaway Capital.

history.origin_story: Founded in October 2021 in Prague as FLO Group s.r.o. with backing from Rockaway Capital

key_milestones.event: Expanded operations across Europe and Australia

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: FLO's core offering — AI strategy consulting, digital transformation advisory, and custom AI implementation — is precisely the space where AI tools are rapidly reducing the need for external consultants. No proprietary data moat or domain-specific technology is apparent; value derives primarily from human expertise.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Growing demand for AI consulting services, but highly competitive market dominated by Big 4 firms, system integrators, and numerous boutique AI consultancies. FLO differentiates via Salesforce/Databricks partnerships and cross-industry presence in Europe and Australia.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Backed by Rockaway Capital, one of the largest CEE investment groups, providing financial runway. However, founded in 2021 and still early-stage, with unclear revenue base and no disclosed funding rounds.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: High AGI displacement risk combined with an intensely competitive consulting market places FLO in a challenging position. The company has no clearly differentiated proprietary technology or data moat, and the primary service lines (AI advisory, digital transformation) are most susceptible to commoditization by AI tools.

metadata.notes: Listed as 'research_group' in companies_index.json but is actually a digital consulting company (FLO Group s.r.o., IČO: 11983311). Leadership team details limited; 'Petr' (LinkedIn: /in/mahdal/) identified as Data & AI head from careers page. Employee count estimated; company operates across Europe and Australia but exact office locations not confirmed beyond Prague HQ.
